name: JEANS
description: Denim editorial — classic jeans campaign. Timeless fashion imagery, iconic denim energy.

steps.prompt: Iconic denim jeans editorial campaign photo. A model wearing the jeans in a classic campaign setting — may be an urban rooftop, industrial loft, or sun-drenched outdoor location. Clean, simple, confident. The jeans are the hero item — texture, fit, and wash are all crisp and detailed. Levi's / Calvin Klein / classic denim brand energy. Natural warm light, medium format photography quality.

Denim campaign video. Model in the jeans walks confidently through a sun-lit setting, the denim fabric moves naturally, camera follows at a medium distance, slow-motion walk cycle, jeans texture and fit are clearly shown. Classic denim brand aesthetic, warm golden light, timeless fashion film.
